case_title: CONNIE C TAM VS. REZIE GUBATINA MALBAS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED DEC-31-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MALBAS, FREDDIE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TAM, CONNIE C AS TO DEFENDANT MALBAS, REZIE GUBATINA MALBAS, FREDDIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED DEC-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MALBAS, REZIE GUBATINA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MALBAS, REZIE GUBATINA MALBAS, FREDDIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, CONNIE C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALBAS, REZIE GUBATINA MALBAS, FREDDIE $171.72 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $356.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT FREDDIE MALBAS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
